hero.title: When one astronaut looks at the galaxy, he sees only part of the truth
hero.subtitle: CosmoFusion DAO is a next-generation decentralized platform where every member becomes part of a collective mind. Here, ideas are born, discussed, and evolve from hypothesis to truth through collaborative thinking, open dialogue, and transparent decision-making.
hero.description: CosmoFusion DAO brings together people with diverse backgrounds and perspectives to find the best solutions, preserve knowledge, and build a community where every contribution matters. We believe that truth is not a final destination, but a continuous journey forward—where every voice counts and the experience of the past shapes the future. Join us to be part of the evolution of ideas, contribute to a common cause, and help create a space for open innovation and collective growth.

visual.description: An astronaut on a planet looking at the galaxy
visual.alt: A lone astronaut contemplates a majestic galaxy

idea.title: Idea
idea.description: Imagine an astronaut looking at a galaxy from a distant planet. He sees the beauty, but does he truly understand the nature of what he observes? The same goes for us—each of us looks at the world through our own lens, making decisions based on a limited perspective. But what if thousands of astronauts looked at the same galaxy from different planets at the same time? What if their visions merged into a single picture of truth?

hypotize.title: Hypothesis
hypotize.description: CosmoFusion DAO is a platform where ideas transform from hypotheses to truth through collective thinking and open dialogue. Here, every voice contributes to knowledge development, and the wisdom of the crowd creates collective intelligence. Through blockchain voting and AI analysis, we create a space where truth emerges from collaborative exploration, not from authority.

list: We are all lonely astronauts in the cosmos of decisions
The astronaut's visor reflects only what he wants to see
When thousands of astronauts look at one galaxy
From a lone astronaut to a collective mind
Truth in motion is not just a beautiful phrase
arr.title: Table of Contents

problem.title: We are all lonely astronauts in the space of decisions
problem.intro: Imagine an astronaut floating in endless space. They see stars, nebulae, distant galaxies — but their vision is limited to a single observation point. This is how today's investment platforms work.

problems.title: Centralization Problem
problems.description: Decisions are made by a narrow circle of 'astronauts' in closed offices. They see only their part of space, unaware of what lies beyond the horizon.

problems.title: Transparency Problem
problems.description: The logic of decisions remains a 'black box'. Users don't understand why this particular strategy was chosen, what data was analyzed, what alternatives were considered.

problems.title: Memory Problem
problems.description: Each mission starts from scratch. Past mistakes are forgotten, successful patterns are not preserved, experience is not passed on to future generations.

problem.quote: If an astronaut makes a mistake in trajectory calculations, who will correct them? If their instruments fail, who will provide alternative data?

solution.title: When thousands of astronauts look at the same galaxy
solution.intro: Imagine: thousands of astronauts on different planets, looking at the same galaxy simultaneously. Each sees it from their own angle, from their own perspective. Together they see the complete picture.

problems.title: Mill's Trident Principle
problems.description: In any argument there are only three possibilities: you are right (need criticism to strengthen), partially right (need opposing views), wrong (need free speech to correct).

problems.title: Collective Intelligence
problems.description: When many minds work together, they can solve problems inaccessible to individuals. Different perspectives complement each other.

problems.title: Process Transparency
problems.description: Every decision, every argument, every vote is recorded in an immutable journal. History becomes a teacher.

problems.title: Idea Evolution
problems.description: Truth is not static — it evolves through collective interaction, criticism, verification, constant refinement.

problems.title: AI-Powered Analysis
problems.description: Artificial intelligence processes vast amounts of data, identifies patterns invisible to humans, and provides unbiased insights to support decision-making.

problems.title: Blockchain Immutability
problems.description: All decisions and their reasoning are permanently recorded on blockchain, creating an unchangeable history that prevents manipulation and ensures accountability.

process.title: Technological Decision-Making Process
steps: Result analysis and knowledge base updates

solution.quote: Truth is born not in the solitude of genius, but in collective search, where every contribution matters, every criticism is constructive, every result teaches.

reflection.title: In the astronaut's visor, only what he wants to see is reflected
reflection.intro: Look at an astronaut whose helmet reflects Earth. Beautiful, right? But this reflection is not Earth itself, but only a distorted representation of it. This is how we perceive reality.

biases.title: Cognitive Biases
biases.description: We see what we want to see, confirm our beliefs, ignore contradictory data. Our 'visor' filters information, leaving only what's convenient.

biases.title: Echo Chambers
biases.description: We surround ourselves with like-minded people, listen only to those who agree with us, create an illusion of universal agreement.

biases.title: Confirmation Bias
biases.description: We seek data that confirms our hypotheses, ignore facts that contradict them.

biases.title: Anchoring Effect
biases.description: The first information we receive becomes an anchor for all subsequent judgments. If we initially hear a negative assessment, we'll evaluate everything through this lens.

biases.title: Groupthink
biases.description: In groups, we tend to conform to majority opinion, suppress dissenting views, and create an illusion of unanimity that prevents critical thinking.

biases.title: Availability Heuristic
biases.description: We judge the probability of events by how easily we can recall similar examples, often ignoring statistical reality in favor of vivid memories.

reflection.quote: What if the astronaut's visor reflects not Earth, but their own expectations? What if reality looks completely different?

governance.title: Democracy of astronauts
governance.intro: Imagine a space station where every astronaut has the right to vote on expedition course decisions. Not hierarchy, but collective wisdom determines the path to truth.

biases.title: One astronaut — one vote
biases.description: Every DAO participant has equal voting rights, regardless of status or resources. It's not power that matters, but collective wisdom.

biases.title: Transparency of all decisions
biases.description: Every vote, every argument, every result is recorded on blockchain. No secret meetings, no hidden motives.

biases.title: Collective responsibility
biases.description: Decisions are made by the community, and the community is responsible for their consequences. Success and failure are shared.

biases.title: Evolution of rules
biases.description: Governance rules are not static — they evolve with the community. New challenges require new approaches.

process.title: Decision-making process:
steps: Proposal of idea by any participant

governance.quote: There's no room for dictatorship in space. Only collective wisdom can lead an expedition to success.

evolution.title: From a single astronaut to a collective mind
evolution.intro: Imagine an astronaut floating in endless space. They see stars, nebulae, distant galaxies — but their vision is limited to a single observation point. This is how today's investment platforms work.

problems.title: Stage 1: Solo Astronaut
problems.description: Traditional platforms are lone explorers making decisions in isolation. They may be brilliant, but their vision is limited to a single point of observation.

problems.title: Stage 2: Group of Explorers
problems.description: A DAO community is a group of astronauts working together. They share observations, discuss hypotheses, and vote for the best solutions.

problems.title: Stage 3: AI Beacons
problems.description: Artificial intelligence becomes cosmic beacons illuminating the path to truth. AI agents analyze data, identify patterns, and propose hypotheses.

problems.title: Stage 4: Collective Intelligence
problems.description: AI + DAO + Blockchain = Collective Intelligence. The system learns from every decision, preserves experience, and evolves together with the community.

process.title: Uniqueness of Approach:
steps: Not static solutions, but dynamic evolution
Not one expert, but collective intelligence
Not closed analytics, but transparent history
Not repeating mistakes, but studying patterns

evolution.quote: We are not just creating a platform — we are creating an ecosystem of collective truth-seeking, where every participant becomes part of something greater.

gettingStarted.title: Getting started with CosmoFusion DAO
gettingStarted.description: Truth awaits those ready to seek it together. Join the collective mind.
arr: Transparency of all processes and decisions
NFT certificates for contribution to development

motionPhrase.text: Truth in Motion is not just a beautiful phrase. It's the principle by which our entire platform works. There are no final answers here, only constant search, collective evolution, endless approximation to truth.

useCases.title: Use Cases
useCases.description: CosmoFusion DAO is a platform for collective intelligence, open innovation, and transparent governance. Here, every member can propose ideas, discuss them with like-minded people, and together turn concepts into real solutions that benefit the whole ecosystem. We unite people from diverse backgrounds—engineers, visionaries, creators, critics, ambassadors, and explorers—who believe that truth is not a static point, but a continuous journey. In CosmoFusion DAO, ideas evolve through open dialogue, constructive criticism, and collective decision-making. Our mission is to preserve knowledge, share best practices, and build a resilient, adaptive organization where every voice matters. All key processes—proposals, discussions, voting, and results—are recorded on-chain, ensuring full transparency and trust. By joining CosmoFusion DAO, you become part of a global movement to shape the future of decentralized collaboration, support breakthrough projects, and create a space where innovation, fairness, and collective wisdom drive progress. Together, we are building an open platform for honest governance, sustainable growth, and the evolution of ideas.

journal.description: Journal is a place where we record all processes and decisions that happen in CosmoFusion DAO. Here you can find all the information about how our platform works and how we make decisions.

footer.title: CosmoFusion DAO
footer.description: CosmoFusion DAO - is a next-generation decentralized community and platform for collective intelligence, open innovation, and transparent governance. Here, every member can propose ideas, discuss them with like-minded people, and together turn concepts into real solutions that benefit the whole ecosystem. We unite people from diverse backgrounds—engineers, visionaries, creators, critics, ambassadors, and explorers—who believe that truth is not a static point, but a continuous journey. In CosmoFusion DAO, ideas evolve through open dialogue, constructive criticism, and collective decision-making. Our mission is to preserve knowledge, share best practices, and build a resilient, adaptive organization where every voice matters. All key processes—proposals, discussions, voting, and results—are recorded on-chain, ensuring full transparency and trust. By joining CosmoFusion DAO, you become part of a global movement to shape the future of decentralized collaboration, support breakthrough projects, and create a space where innovation, fairness, and collective wisdom drive progress. Together, we are building an open platform for honest governance, sustainable growth, and the evolution of ideas.

jobBuilder.title: Choose your role in the collective mind
jobBuilder.description: Each role in CosmoFusion DAO contributes to the collective search for truth. Choose the role that best fits your skills and interests.

roles.title: Explorer: Votes for new ideas!
responsibilities: Propose at least 1 idea per voting cycle, registered in the blockchain journal.
Vote for 3+ hypotheses, adding arguments to the transparent journal.
Participate in discussions before voting, leaving at least 2 comments.
rewards: 8 governance tokens for an accepted idea (by voting results).
3 tokens for active voting with argumentation.
Goal: Launch ideas and support promising hypotheses through voting, advancing the collective search for truth.
addons: Launch ideas and support promising hypotheses through voting, advancing the collective search for truth.
Opportunity to become an expert and receive additional rewards.
Participation in the expert group evaluating the quality of hypotheses.

roles.title: Critic: Votes for proven ideas!
responsibilities: Evaluate 3+ hypotheses per cycle, indicating weaknesses in the journal.
Vote for or against ideas, justifying the choice in the blockchain.
Write at least 3 comments in discussions, strengthening criticism.
rewards: 7 tokens for accepted criticism (confirmed by votes).
3 tokens for voting with transparent argumentation.
addons: Evaluate and maintain the quality of hypotheses, advancing the collective search for truth.
Opportunity to become an expert and receive additional rewards.
Participation in the expert group evaluating the quality of hypotheses.

roles.title: Creator: Develops new ideas!
roles.description: My tools will strengthen the DAO!
responsibilities: Propose 1+ AI or platform improvement per cycle, registered in the blockchain.
Vote for 3+ technical proposals, justifying the choice.
Participate in technical discussions, leaving 2+ comments.
rewards: 10 governance tokens for an accepted improvement (by voting results).
5 tokens for active voting with argumentation.
addons: Develop and improve the platform, advancing the collective search for truth.
Opportunity to become an expert and receive additional rewards.
Participation in the expert group evaluating the quality of hypotheses.

roles.title: Observer: Monitors the process! Votes for lessons!
responsibilities: Propose 1+ AI or platform improvement per cycle, registered in the blockchain.
Vote for 3+ technical proposals, justifying the choice.
Participate in technical discussions, leaving 2+ comments.
rewards: 10 tokens for an accepted technical proposal.
addons: Monitor the process, advancing the collective search for truth.
Opportunity to become an expert and receive additional rewards.
Participation in the expert group evaluating the quality of hypotheses.

roles.title: Manager: Votes for order in the DAO!
responsibilities: Propose 1+ governance rule per cycle, recorded in the blockchain.
Vote for 5+ proposals, justifying in the journal.
Moderate 2+ discussions before voting for transparency.
rewards: 10 tokens for an accepted governance rule.
addons: Ensure fair voting, forming transparent governance.
Monitor the process, advancing the collective search for truth.
Opportunity to become an expert and receive additional rewards.
Participation in the expert group evaluating the quality of governance rules.

roles.title: Ambassador: Votes for DAO growth!
roles.description: I will tell the whole galaxy about the DAO!
responsibilities: Vote for 3+ proposals promoting the DAO mission.
Share voting results in Telegram/Discord (2+ posts per cycle).
Attract 2+ new participants to voting via referral links.
rewards: 10 tokens for an accepted technical proposal.
addons: Tell the whole galaxy about the DAO.
Opportunity to become an expert and receive additional rewards.
Participation in the expert group evaluating the quality of proposals.
